testsuite.name: Chrome Headless 142.0.0.0 (Windows 10)

property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/142.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: AdminGamesPlayoffsDetail - Date/Time Pickers should create
AdminGamesPlayoffsDetail - Date/Time Pickers should have form controls for gameDate and gameTime as Date objects
AdminGamesPlayoffsDetail - Date/Time Pickers should set Date objects in form when editing existing record
AdminGamesPlayoffsDetail - Date/Time Pickers should combine date and time when saving
AdminGamesPlayoffsDetail - Date/Time Pickers should have isFormDirty method for PendingChangesGuard
adminGuard allows when adminModule flag enabled
adminGuard blocks when adminModule flag disabled
AdminListDetailShell Component Initialization should create the component
AdminListDetailShell Component Initialization should have default input values
AdminListDetailShell Component Initialization should accept custom configuration values
AdminListDetailShell Component Initialization should initialize with loading state
AdminListDetailShell Component Initialization should initialize with error state
AdminListDetailShell Table Display should render the title
AdminListDetailShell Table Display should render the add button when showAddButton is true
AdminListDetailShell Table Display should not render the add button when showAddButton is false

testcase.name: AdminListDetailShell Event Emissions should call onAdd method when add button is clicked
AdminListDetailShell Loading State should show loading spinner when isLoading is true
AdminListDetailShell Loading State should show loading text when isLoading is true
AdminListDetailShell Loading State should hide table when isLoading is true
AdminListDetailShell Loading State should show table when isLoading is false
AdminListDetailShell Error State should show error message when errorMessage is set
AdminListDetailShell Error State should show error icon when errorMessage is set
AdminListDetailShell Error State should hide table when errorMessage is set
AdminListDetailShell Error State should not show error message when errorMessage is null
AdminListDetailShell Error State should have proper ARIA role for error message
AdminListDetailShell Empty State should show default empty state when no data
AdminListDetailShell Empty State should show empty state icon
AdminListDetailShell Empty State should show empty state message
AdminListDetailShell Empty State should show empty state hint when showAddButton is true
AdminListDetailShell Empty State should not show empty state hint when showAddButton is false

testcase.name: AdminSeasonDetail should create
AdminUserDetail should create
AdminUserDetail should load households on init
AdminUserDetail should include houseId and peopleId in form configuration
AdminUserDetail should load people when household is selected
AdminUserDetail should clear people options when household is deselected
AdminUserDetail should sort people by last name then first name
AdminUserDetail should sort households alphabetically by name
AdminUserDetail should reset form with empty houseId and peopleId for new user
AdminUsersList should create and render rows

testcase.name: AuthGuard should allow activation when logged in
AuthGuard should redirect to login with returnUrl when not logged in
AuthGuard should allow load when logged in
AuthGuard should block load when not logged in
ContentEdit Component Initialization should create
ContentEdit Component Initialization should initialize with correct default values
ContentEdit Component Initialization should initialize form with correct structure and validators
ContentEdit Form Validation should validate title field correctly
ContentEdit Form Validation should validate subtitle field correctly
ContentEdit Form Validation should validate expiration date field correctly
ContentEdit Content Loading and Effects should populate form when content is retrieved
ContentEdit Content Loading and Effects should set page title correctly for new content
ContentEdit Content Loading and Effects should set page title correctly for existing content
ContentEdit Content Loading and Effects should compute content types correctly
ContentEdit Save Functionality should save content when form is valid and dirty
ContentEdit Save Functionality should not save content when form is invalid
ContentEdit Save Functionality should not save content when form is not dirty
ContentEdit Save Functionality should create WebContent object with correct values when saving
ContentEdit Delete Functionality should delete content when webContentId is not 0
ContentEdit Delete Functionality should not delete content when webContentId is 0
ContentEdit Helper Methods should format text correctly
ContentEdit Helper Methods should convert values to numbers correctly
ContentEdit Helper Methods should return correct float label value
ContentEdit Helper Methods should detect form dirty state correctly
ContentEdit Helper Methods should get web content type correctly
ContentEdit Helper Methods should handle input events
ContentEdit Update Method should update form with content values
ContentEdit Update Method should format text and log it
ContentEdit Error Handling should have hasError method that returns empty string
YourService put should make a PUT request with the correct URL and data
YourService put should handle errors appropriately
YourService put should handle null response
YourService put should include custom headers in the request
